title: galactia wrightii var. wrightii
intro: Galactia wrightii var. wrightii, also known as Wright's milkpea, is a perennial legume native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, as well as providing potential protection against certain diseases. Galactia wrightii var. wrightii can be prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
